title: Independence Day Celebration
description: Join us for a grand celebration of India's Independence Day with flag hoisting, patriotic performances, cultural programs, and inspiring speeches by distinguished guests.

title: Annual Sports Day
description: A day full of athletic events, team sports, and competitive spirit. Students from all classes will participate in various track and field events.

title: Science Exhibition 2026
description: Annual inter-school science exhibition showcasing innovative projects and experiments by students from classes VI to XII.

title: Annual Cultural Fest
description: The biggest cultural event of the year featuring dance performances, drama, music, art exhibitions, and literary competitions.

title: Parent-Teacher Meeting
description: Quarterly parent-teacher meeting for classes IX to XII. Parents will receive progress reports and discuss their ward's academic performance.

title: Annual Function & Prize Distribution
description: Grand annual function featuring student performances, prize distribution ceremony, and felicitation of meritorious students and staff.

title: Republic Day Celebration
description: Celebration of Republic Day with flag hoisting ceremony, march past, patriotic songs, and cultural performances by students.

title: Inter-School Debate Competition
description: Annual inter-school debate competition on Teachers' Day. Students from various schools will showcase their oratory skills and critical thinking.
